title: Raccoon Removal in Hollis, Queens | $900–$4,000
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in Hollis, Queens. Humane trapping, exclusion & cleanup. Serving homes near Hollis Park. Call today for a free estimate!
intro: Raccoons are increasingly common in Hollis, Queens, where tree-lined residential streets and accessible attics provide ideal shelter for these clever animals. Best Pest Control NYC offers comprehensive raccoon removal services throughout Hollis, protecting your home from property damage and health risks. Our experienced technicians provide humane trapping, secure exclusion work, and thorough cleanup to ensure raccoons don't return.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Hollis homeowners for years with fast, effective raccoon removal tailored to the unique housing stock of this Queens neighborhood. Our licensed professionals understand local wildlife patterns and use proven, humane methods to safely remove raccoons and prevent re-entry, all backed by our satisfaction guarantee.
localContext: Hollis features predominantly single-family homes with attics, chimneys, and crawl spaces that attract raccoons seeking denning sites, especially near Hollis Park and the residential areas surrounding Francis Lewis Boulevard. The mature trees throughout the neighborhood provide easy roof access for raccoons, making professional exclusion work essential for long-term protection.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Hollis, Queens?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Hollis typically costs between $900 and $4,000, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, entry points requiring exclusion, and any necessary attic cleanup or damage repair. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning any work.

faqs.question: What are signs of raccoons in my Hollis home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include loud thumping or scratching sounds in your attic at night, visible paw prints, torn shingles or damaged soffits, tipped-over garbage cans, and raccoon droppings near entry points. You may also notice a strong musky odor if raccoons have been present for some time.

faqs.question: Is raccoon removal in Hollis safe and humane?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use only humane, live-capture traps and follow all NYC wildlife regulations. Our technicians are trained to safely handle raccoons and relocate them according to local guidelines. We never use poisons or harmful methods, and we take special care when mothers and babies are involved.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my Hollis property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service throughout Hollis and can typically begin trapping immediately after your inspection. Complete removal usually takes 3-7 days depending on the number of raccoons, followed by exclusion work to seal entry points and prevent future infestations.
